sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_division (a DOUBLE, b DOUBLE, result DOUBLE);
INSERT INTO test_division (a, b, result) VALUES (5, 2, fdiv(5, 2));
UPDATE test_division SET result = fdiv(15, 4) WHERE a = 5;
SELECT a, b, result FROM test_division WHERE result > 3;
SELECT fdiv(a, b) AS division_result FROM test_division WHERE b != 0;
